nl_query: For each department, show the department name, number of courses, number of faculty members, number of active boards, number of scripts currently in evaluation, and the average marks awarded per script.
failed_sql: SELECT au.name AS academic_unit_name, COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) AS course_count, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.id) AS faculty_count, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS active_board_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ea.evaluation_status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED' THEN a.id ELSE NULL END) AS scripts_in_evaluation, AVG(COUNT(em.marks_awarded) FILTER (WHERE em.is_final = TRUE)) OVER (PARTITION BY au.id) AS avg_evaluation_marks_per_script FROM academic_unit au JOIN academic_unit_closure c ON au.id = c.descendant_id JOIN academic_unit course ON course.id = c.ancestor_id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.department_id = au.id JOIN board b ON b.course_id = au.id JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id JOIN evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id WHERE au.unit_type = 'COURSE' GROUP BY au.name, au.id, fc.id, b.id, a.id ORDER BY course_count DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Unknown table or alias 'answer_script' referenced in 'answer_script.id'. Ensure it is declared in the FROM/JOIN clause.
